title.romaji: Tai-Ari deshita.: Ojou-sama wa Kakutou Game nante Shinai
title.english: Young Ladies Don't Play Fighting Games
title.native: 対ありでした。 ～お嬢さまは格闘ゲームなんてしない～

description:
Mitsuki Aya has one goal at the elite Kuromi Girls’ Academy: to become a refined young lady like the school’s flawless “White Lily,” Yorue Mio. But her image of Mio shatters when Aya accidentally catches her...playing fighting games?! Turns out, the elegant Mio is actually a hardcore gamer—and she wants to duel Aya! The battle (and their friendship) begins.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.native: アズールレーン アニメPVs

description:
Assorted commercials for the Azur Lane Mobile Game posted on the official Youtube channel. The animation is unique to these commercials and is not present in the game nor in the TV Series.

The list of the commercials is as follows (note that CMs without animation are not present and, for the ones with long and short versions, the longer version is taken into consideration):

1) 縹映る深緋の残響篇 (17 April 2020)
2) 神穹を衝く聖歌 (19 May 2020)
3) 極夜照らす幻光 (23 July 2020)
